open_gaps.SEC-002: LOW, unchanged. viewer.js loadDocument() still imposes no numPages>1000 cap at the load boundary; merge.js addFiles() has no cumulative-bytes/page cap. Client-side-only DoS (uploader's own tab) on the 1.6 GiB box. Developer task — fix once at the viewer load boundary to cover all per-page consumers. Race amplifier already fixed (TASK-316).

notes: 29 JS modules. Two new since last review: statistics.js (read-only analytics — all PDF-derived values via textContent/addRow, innerHTML only as empty-string clears, page.cleanup() called per page, no download/upload/external request) and keyboard-shortcuts.js (reference-card overlay only; built once via createElement, all textContent; global '?' handler guards isTypingTarget + modifier keys; CSP-safe). app.js wires both init calls. Full-JS audit: zero non-empty innerHTML assignments, zero eval/Function/document.write, zero external fetch/XHR/script-src. upload.js enforces ext+MIME+empty+size(50MB)+%PDF- magic; filenames sanitized (path separators stripped). Live headers verified: full CSP, X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN, Referrer-Policy, nosniff. Path blocking: .git/.bak/.sh/.md all 403, traversal 404. No git secrets, no failed/invalid SSH auth in last 24h.
